name: MOVING iMAGE TECHNOLOGIES INC.
summary: Corporate Overview The Company was incorporated in June2020 initially named MiT Acquisition Corporation, which was changed to Moving iMage Technologies,Inc. in September2020. In connection with our initial public offering, in July2021, the holders of Moving iMage Technologies, LLC exchanged their interests for shares of the Company resulting in Moving iMage Technologies, LLC to become the Companys wholly owned subsidiary.
